story.iWant: to provide my brand assets (website URL, PDF, images) and a brief description
story.soThat: the system can extract my brand's visual DNA

subtasks.subtask: 1.1: Add step in setup workflow to prompt for website URL (optional)
1.2: Add step to prompt for PDF file paths (optional, accepts comma-separated list)
1.3: Add step to prompt for image file paths (optional, accepts comma-separated list)
1.4: Add step to prompt for brand description (required, cannot be empty)
2.1: Validate that at least one visual asset is provided (URL OR PDF OR image)
2.2: If all visual assets skipped, display error and re-prompt
2.3: Validate file paths exist for PDF and image inputs
2.4: Validate URL format for website input
3.1: Display summary of all collected inputs
3.2: Show which inputs were provided vs skipped
3.3: Ask user to confirm before proceeding to analysis
3.4: Allow user to go back and modify inputs if needed
4.1: Call WebFetch with provided URL to retrieve page content
4.2: Handle WebFetch errors gracefully (network failures, 404, etc.)
4.3: Store WebFetch result for CSS/style extraction in next story

task.title: Implement Claude Vision integration for PDF/images

subtasks.subtask: 5.1: Use Read tool to load PDF files and pass to Claude Vision analysis
5.2: Use Read tool to load image files and pass to Claude Vision analysis
5.3: Handle file read errors gracefully (file not found, corrupted)
5.4: Store vision analysis results for primitive extraction in next story
6.1: Add Phase 1 steps for asset collection to instructions.md
6.2: Add validation actions for input requirements
6.3: Add confirmation checkpoint before proceeding
6.4: Add error handling actions for invalid inputs
6.5: Add WebFetch and Vision analysis actions
7.1: Test with website URL only - verify WebFetch called
7.2: Test with PDF only - verify Vision analysis runs
7.3: Test with image only - verify Vision analysis runs
7.4: Test with description only - verify error and re-prompt
7.5: Test with all inputs - verify all captured and confirmed
7.6: Test confirmation step allows proceed or go back

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given the user runs `/setup`, when prompted for brand inputs, then they can provide: website URL (optional), PDF file paths (optional), image file paths (optional), brief brand description (required)
At least one visual asset (URL, PDF, or image) must be provided alongside the description
The system confirms all inputs before proceeding to analysis
Given a website URL is provided, when processing inputs, then the system fetches and analyzes the page via WebFetch
Given PDF or image files are provided, when processing inputs, then the system analyzes them via Claude Vision

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Theme Creation
doc.snippet: Asset Collector module prompts user for website URL (optional), PDF paths (optional), image paths (optional), brand description (required). Validates at least one visual asset provided. Stores source list for theme.json meta.sources.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Theme Creation
doc.snippet: Phase 1 Asset Collection: Display welcome, prompt for URL/PDF/images/description, validate at least one visual asset + description, confirm inputs with user before proceeding.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: Input Sources: Website URL via WebFetch for HTML/CSS analysis, PDF files via Claude vision for visual analysis, Image files via Claude vision for color/style extraction, User description for context interpretation.

doc.title: Slide Builder PRD
doc.snippet: AI does the work, user is creative director. User provides inputs once (URL, PDF, images, description). AI makes all decisions, extracts colors/fonts, infers brand personality.

doc.title: Slide Builder Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: As a Solutions Consultant, I want to provide my brand assets so that the system can extract my brand's visual DNA. At least one visual asset (URL, PDF, or image) must be provided.

doc.title: Slide Builder Conventions
doc.snippet: All workflows follow BMAD pattern: Load workflow.yaml, Read instructions.md, Execute steps in order, Pause at template-output and ask tags, Update status.yaml with progress.

file.reason: Primary workflow configuration that will be updated to implement asset collection. Currently has basic structure with instructions path.
Step 1 needs enhancement with detailed prompt sequence, validation logic, and confirmation flow per AC requirements.
Claude Code skill that invokes the setup workflow. Already registered and working per Story 1.4.
Documents the BMAD workflow pattern that asset collection must follow: load yaml, read instructions, execute steps, update status.

node.note: Used for HTML-to-image conversion in Epic 7, not needed for this story
Used for Google Slides export in Epic 7, not needed for this story

claudeTools.note: Required for AC2.1.4 - fetching website content for CSS/style extraction
Required for AC2.1.5 - analyzing PDF and image files for visual extraction

constraints.constraint: ADR-001: 100% alignment with BMAD workflow pattern - workflows use workflow.yaml + instructions.md structure
ADR-005: Local-first architecture - all brand asset analysis performed locally via Claude, no external uploads (NFR12, NFR13)
Asset Collector must validate at least one visual asset (URL OR PDF OR image) is provided alongside required description
User provides inputs once - no JSON editing, no pixel values, no micro-decisions. AI interprets inputs.
Input sources will be stored in theme.json meta.sources for reference
Workflows must update .slide-builder/status.yaml with progress at each major step
WebFetch used for URLs (public, no auth), Claude Vision via Read tool for PDFs/images

interface.name: WebFetch tool
interface.signature: WebFetch(url: string, prompt: string) - Fetches URL content and processes with prompt

interface.name: Read tool (Claude Vision)
interface.signature: Read(file_path: string) - Reads file, including visual analysis for PDFs/images

interface.name: status.yaml state file
interface.signature: mode, last_action, last_modified, history[] - Tracks workflow progress

tests.standards: This is a Claude Code workflow project without traditional unit tests. Testing is performed via manual CLI testing through the Frontend Test Gate defined in the story. The test approach follows the tech-spec Test Strategy: individual input type verification, full flow integration, and edge case handling for invalid inputs.

locations.location: Frontend Test Gate in story file defines manual CLI test steps
No automated test files exist yet - this is an agentic workflow project

ideas.idea: Test each input prompt appears in sequence (URL, PDF, images, description)
Test optional inputs can be skipped with Enter key
Test required input (description) cannot be empty
Test with only description provided - should fail with re-prompt
Test with URL only + description - should succeed
Test with PDF only + description - should succeed
Test with image only + description - should succeed
Test confirmation step displays all provided inputs accurately
Test user can go back and modify inputs from confirmation
Test WebFetch is called when URL provided
Test Claude Vision analyzes PDF when path provided
Test Claude Vision analyzes images when paths provided
Test file not found error handling
